name: Mulligan's Indoor Golf
about: Mulligan's Indoor Golf operates as a budget-friendly golf simulator bar with locations in Plymouth and Eagan, Minnesota. The venue offers indoor golf simulator technology alongside food, drinks, and entertainment for golfers of all skill levels. It is dedicated to providing the lowest rates in the Twin Cities metro area and emphasizes its accurate simulators and extensive course selection. The facility is open daily with extended hours, though it operates by appointment only during the summer months. Members receive unlimited access to the facility and special early access.
why_golfers_like_it: Guaranteed lowest rates of any golf simulator bar in the Twin Cities
Extended hours with early access for members
Pay-in-bulk packages that never expire and have no guest fees
Food and beverage options available on-site

food_and_drink.notes: Offers 7th Avenue pizza, hot dogs, brats, and other snack items. Full menu available online.
No mention of alcohol being available for on-site consumption.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether they provide club rentals. It is recommended to bring your own clubs to ensure you have the proper equipment for your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not mentioned as being allowed. The venue offers its own food menu, including 7th Avenue pizza and other snack items.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for playing 18 holes, which can vary depending on the simulator software, number of players, and pace of play.

faq.question: Is Mulligan's kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Mulligan's appears to be kid-friendly, offering a family-oriented environment with food options and an atmosphere suitable for all skill levels.
